title: Verify trial corner widget displays correct remaining days on homepage
description: Test that the persistent trial corner widget shows accurate remaining days count from trial activation date
preconditions: User has activated a paid trial

steps.description: 3. Locate the trial corner widget in header
4. Verify the remaining days displayed matches actual trial days left

expected_result: Widget displays accurate number of remaining trial days (e.g., 6 Days Remaining)
